name: annotate-ai
description: Point-and-click design feedback for AI agents. Annotate any element on your WordPress site, submit structured feedback, and let your AI agent action it.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:pkg-json
scripts.makejson: wp i18n make-json languages --no-purge && node bin/fix-json-sources.mjs
scripts.i18n: npm run makepot && npm run makemo && npm run makejson

author: Thomas Guillot
